---
title: "Portable spatial frequency Domain imaging using Open-source tools"
date: 2026-03-04
author:
  - name: Sampaio, Murilo S.
  - name: Da Cruz Junior, Luismar B.
  - name: Barros, Kaio B.
  - name: Da Silva Oliveira, Julia C.
  - name: F. G. Do Monte, Adamo
  - name: Cunha, Diego M.
  - name: Bachmann, Luciano
abstract: > 
  Resumo não disponível.
categories: [article]
citation: 
  container-title: "Instrumentation Science & Technology"
  volume: 54
  issue: 2
  doi: "10.1080/10739149.2025.2513279"
---

```{=html}
<nav aria-label="breadcrumb">
  <ol class="breadcrumb">
    <li class="breadcrumb-item"><a href="../../index.html">Home</a></li>
    <li class="breadcrumb-item"><a href="../index.html">Publicações</a></li>
    <li class="breadcrumb-item active" aria-current="page">Portable spatial frequency Domain imaging using Open-source tools</li>
  </ol>
</nav>
